Implementation_Tip: Use padding/gap in 8px increments. E.g., gap: 1rem (16px), p-4 (16px).

Constraint: Fast for interactive / Medium for page
Implementation_Tip: 150ms for micro-interactions (press), 200-250ms for hover, 300ms for modals.
Use 'cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)' or spring-like bounces for premium feel.
Base 16px -> 20px -> 25px -> 31px -> 39px. Use 400 for body, 600/700 for headings.
Ensure all buttons/links have a hit area of at least 44x44px, even if visual is smaller.
Check text over background using contrast tools. No light grey on white.
Use 2-3 layers of soft shadows. E.g., '0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)'.
